title: The Raid Erupts Across Onigashima
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Big Mom, Nami, Robin, Luffy, Momonosuke as The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.
scene: The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They ran over big mom with a bike!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big mom is pissed!! Run for your lives!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Alright, just tell me what to do

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey Shinobu!! She's on our side!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm open!! I will protect you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey wait!! Why are you running away from me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They just keep on coming... one after the other...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: gyaah!! Big mom is gonna kick up a storm!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We're gonna get dragged into it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: fighting these guys won't get us anywhere, am I right...

dialogue.speaker: Denjiro
dialogue.text: Denjiro told me about the Tobi roppo

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's go deal with them!! Even if we can't win we'll slow them down at least

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, fighting these drunkards is just a waste of time!!

dialogue.speaker: King
dialogue.text: long time no see soul King!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your crew really has some rare creatures!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you like the iron body you Hag!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My name is frankly!! I'm a cyborg!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No frankly, run away!! She's a yonkou!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What the hell is all that...!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Aren't we gonna make our captain...

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Hey!!!this place isn't your banquet hall!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's the worst that could happen!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That reminds me of Thriller bark!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's from the same race as oars!! Just what the hell are they!?

summary: This section advances the Wano - Onigashima Raid Erupts storyline with 65 dialogue beats. The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.
